judge_scores.reasoning: The model correctly identifies the Lula government (2023) as declaring the emergency and accurately contextualizes it by explaining how the crisis was aggravated under the Bolsonaro government, which did not declare an emergency despite warnings.

The response correctly identifies that the humanitarian emergency was declared by the Lula government in February 2023 and accurately attributes the exacerbation of the crisis to the policies of the Bolsonaro administration.
